degraded_reason: Parent implemented the selected focused streaming bead directly and used two independent reviewer subagents plus targeted re-review subagents.
implementation_summary: Added public streaming model turn helpers for start, chunk, first token, successful end, partial failure, cancellation, usage, latency, retry attempt, redaction summaries, and correlation metadata.
Embedded stream chunk, first-token, and cancellation observations as stream span events so recorder and exporter adapters preserve them as model events rather than top-level spans.
Updated recorder, no-network, and Datadog conversion coverage to preserve stream events, cancellation metadata, explicit zero token counts, and event error semantics.
validation: schema re-review git diff --check main...HEAD: pass
review_blocker_summary: Initial schema review requested moving stream chunk, first-token, and cancellation observations off top-level public export and into stream span events.
